title: From and Reply-To mismatch
description: Sender domains differ.
technical_impact: Replies may be redirected.
possible_business_impact: A recipient could communicate with an unexpected party.
remediation: Validate the sender through an approved channel.

title: From and Return-Path mismatch
description: Envelope and visible sender domains differ.
technical_impact: Routing metadata is inconsistent.
possible_business_impact: Message provenance may require review.

title: Header-reported SPF failure
description: A supplied header reports SPF failure; this is not live verification.
technical_impact: The asserted sending host may not match the asserted policy.
possible_business_impact: Sender confidence may be reduced.

title: Header-reported DKIM failure
description: A supplied header reports DKIM failure; cryptographic validity was not verified.
technical_impact: The reported signature check did not pass.
possible_business_impact: Message integrity may require review.

title: Header-reported DMARC failure
description: A supplied header reports DMARC failure; no DNS verification occurred.
technical_impact: The reported alignment check did not pass.
possible_business_impact: Visible sender identity may need validation.

title: Missing authentication-result context
description: Authentication headers were not supplied and may have been omitted by forwarding or pasting.
technical_impact: Local review has less context.
possible_business_impact: Confidence is limited.
remediation: Obtain original gateway headers if authorized.

title: Suspicious or obfuscated URL
description: Static lexical URL characteristics warrant review.
technical_impact: The destination text may obscure intent.
possible_business_impact: A recipient may be misdirected.
remediation: Do not visit; validate through approved tooling.

title: IP-literal URL
description: A URL uses an IP-literal hostname.
technical_impact: The URL avoids a conventional domain label.
possible_business_impact: Destination identity is harder to assess.

title: Punycode or lookalike-domain indicator
description: Local string comparison found a lookalike characteristic.
technical_impact: The hostname may be visually misleading.
possible_business_impact: Users may confuse it with a familiar brand.

title: Shortened-link domain
description: A locally catalogued URL shortener was observed.
technical_impact: The final destination is not visible.
possible_business_impact: Users cannot assess the destination from the message.
remediation: Do not follow the link during triage.

title: Unsafe URI scheme
description: An unsupported or active-content URI scheme was supplied.
technical_impact: Opening could invoke local or active behavior.
possible_business_impact: User action could expose the workstation.

title: Anchor display and target mismatch
description: Displayed link text and inert target host differ.
technical_impact: The visible destination is misleading.
possible_business_impact: Recipients may trust the displayed text.
remediation: Treat the link as untrusted pending review.

title: Sensitive query parameter
description: A sensitive query key was present and its value was redacted.
technical_impact: Secrets may have been embedded in a URL.
possible_business_impact: Account or workflow data could be exposed.

title: Credential-request language
description: Credential-request language was observed.
technical_impact: The message encourages disclosure of authentication data.
possible_business_impact: Accounts could be compromised if the request is trusted.

title: Urgency or threat language
description: Urgent or threatening wording was observed.
technical_impact: Time pressure can reduce scrutiny.
possible_business_impact: Recipients may bypass normal controls.

title: Payment or gift-card request
description: Payment, invoice, or gift-card language was observed.
technical_impact: The message requests a financial action.
possible_business_impact: Unverified action could cause financial loss.

title: Enable-content instruction
description: The text asks the recipient to enable active document content.
technical_impact: Enabling content may activate unsafe behavior.
possible_business_impact: The endpoint may be exposed.

title: Suspicious attachment metadata
description: Attachment filename or extension metadata warrants review.
technical_impact: The attachment type may support active content.
possible_business_impact: Opening it could affect the workstation.
remediation: Keep isolated and use an approved sandbox.

title: Double-extension attachment
description: A filename uses a potentially misleading double extension.
technical_impact: The visible type may differ from the final extension.
possible_business_impact: A recipient may open an unexpected file type.
remediation: Do not open or rename it.

title: MIME and extension mismatch
description: Declared MIME family differs from the filename-derived type.
technical_impact: Attachment metadata is inconsistent.
possible_business_impact: File handling may be misleading.

title: HTML form or password-field indicator
description: Inert HTML contains form or password-input markup.
technical_impact: The content may solicit data.
possible_business_impact: Users may disclose credentials.
remediation: Do not interact with the form.

title: Hidden-content or iframe indicator
description: Inert HTML contains hidden or framed content.
technical_impact: Displayed content may omit relevant elements.
possible_business_impact: Users may see a misleading presentation.

title: Excessive link concentration
description: The bounded message has many links relative to text.
technical_impact: The message emphasizes external actions.
possible_business_impact: Recipients may be directed away from trusted workflows.

title: Local watchlist match
description: An indicator matched the application-only local watchlist.
technical_impact: The indicator was previously flagged locally.
possible_business_impact: Repeat exposure may require investigation.

title: Local classifier risk indicator
description: The bundled synthetic-data classifier produced an elevated indicator; this is not a verdict.
technical_impact: Lexical similarity to synthetic phishing-like examples was observed.
possible_business_impact: Analyst review may be warranted.
remediation: Use structural evidence and human review.
